## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm publish --dry-run --access public` shows the expected file list (if touching packaging)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by a test OR I've explained why it isn't testable here
- [ ] Docs updated — README / spec / SECURITY-PATCHES — if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added to `@morlock/core` (zero-dep is a design goal)
